message:
fix: remove release_max_level_info from workspace tracing dep (#78)

Cargo features are additive across the dep graph. Setting
release_max_level_info at the workspace level statically compiles out
TRACE/DEBUG events for every downstream consumer in release builds,
which is fundamentally an application-level decision a library cannot
make on a binary's behalf.

Surfaced via cass#204 where a Windows TUI debug session needed TRACE
events but `tracing` printed: "the static max level is `info` ...
remove the `max_level_info` feature from the `tracing` crate".
`cargo tree -i tracing -e features | grep release_max_level_info`
confirmed frankensqlite was the unique source.

Closes #78

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
